articles.title: Concurrent losers: 14 smallcap stocks decline for 5 consecutive sessions
articles.description: Over the five trading sessions ending March 20, the Sensex benchmark remained largely flat with a slight negative bias, slipping just 31 points to close at 74,532. Although the index advanced in four out of the five sessions, a sharp decline of around 2,500 points on March 19 erased most of those gains. During the same period, 14 stocks in the BSE SmallCap index recorded continuous declines across all five sessions, with cumulative losses of up to 23%. (Data source: ACE Equity)

articles.description: Musk found liable to Twitter shareholders in fraud lawsuit over  billion takeover

articles.title: ‘I had lost around…,’ Punjab Kings skipper Shreyas Iyer recalls recovery process from spleen injury before IPL 2026
articles.description: Shreyas Iyer had sustained a spleen injury during India's ODI series against Australia in October 2025.

articles.title: Air India deployed wrong aircraft for Vancouver; plane returned to Delhi
articles.description: An apparent lapse in updating the list of requirements for the operation of flights to Canada resulted in the situation, where a wrong aircraft was deployed for the particular service, sources said

articles.title: SS Rajamouli praises Ranveer Singh in Dhurandhar 2, calls it a masterclass in acting
articles.description: SS Rajamouli praises Ranveer Singh in Dhurandhar  calls it a masterclass in acting

articles.title: Air India, IndiGo, SpiceJet oppose government’s 60% free seat selection decision
articles.description: The Federation of Indian Airlines (FIA), which represents the three airlines, has also urged the Civil Aviation Ministry to take steps to withdraw the decision.

topStories.title: US, Israel Airstrikes Cripple Iranian Rocket, Satellite Programs
topStories.description: The US and Israel have targeted infrastructure for satellites and rockets, part of an effort to destroy technology that could be used for weapons programs, an Iran expert said.

topStories.title: PM Modi, President Murmu extend Id-ul-Fitr greetings
topStories.description: President Murmu urged all to resolve to promote unity and harmony in society and contribute to the nation’s progress

topStories.title: PM Modi, President Murmu, Rahul Gandhi, other leaders extend Eid ul-Fitr greetings, wish for harmony and happiness
topStories.description: Eid ul-Fitr is celebrated by Muslims following the end of the month-long, dawn-to-dusk fasting during Ramadan and falls on the first day of Shawwal, the tenth month of the Islamic calendar.

topStories.title: US allows 30-day sale of Iran oil as prices cross $110 again. Will crude oil fall on Monday?
topStories.description: The US has allowed a temporary waiver on Iranian oil sales to ease surging crude prices amid escalating geopolitical tensions. However, analysts warn that supply disruptions and the Strait of Hormuz crisis could keep prices elevated, with forecasts suggesting oil may rise further despite short-term relief measures from policy actions.

topStories.title: America Is Easing Up On Iranian Oil To Cool Surging Crude Prices
topStories.description: In a statement on Friday, the Treasury outlined that the allowance is valid till April 19.

topStories.title: Putin Offered To Ditch Iran If US Cut Off Ukraine? What Russia Said
topStories.description: The Washington Post had reported earlier this month that Russia had passed sensitive intelligence to Iran amid its war against the US and Israel.

topStories.title: Aid flotilla for Cuba sets sail from Mexico
topStories.description: An aid flotilla from Mexico is sailing for Cuba as the country suffers under a tightening US fuel blockade.

topStories.title:
Assembly election LIVE: 116 candidates, including CM, Speaker, LoP file nominations in Assam
 till Friday
topStories.description: Assam Congress on Friday (March 20, 2026) released the fourth list of seven candidates, taking the total tally to 94 in the 126-seat Assembly elections.

topStories.title: New court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned — a week after Trump declared the relationship kaput
topStories.description: Anthropic submitted two sworn declarations to a California federal court late Friday afternoon, pushing back on the Pentagon's assertion that the AI company poses an "unacceptable risk to national security" and arguing that the government's case relies on technical misunderstandings and claims that were never actually raised during the months of negotiations.

topStories.title: US permits temporary sale of Iranian oil stranded at sea as crude tops $112 a barrel amid Middle East conflict
topStories.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said in a post on X that his department was issuing a temporary authorisation permitting the sale of the stranded Iranian oil.

topStories.title: SC grants bail to accused in Andhra Pradesh liquor case
topStories.description: The Supreme Court granted bail to Muppidi Avinash Reddy in the Andhra liquor case, citing completed interrogation and co-accused already granted bail.

topStories.description: Trump says Strait of Hormuz must be protected from Iranian attacks 'by other nations who use it'.

dailyNews.title: US lifts sanctions on some Iranian oil as gas prices soar
dailyNews.description: The treasury secretary says the move will quickly bring about 140m barrels of oil to global markets.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE: US allows sale of oil originating from Iran as Tehran threatens attacks beyond Middle East
dailyNews.description: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE: Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei said the United States and Israel were acting on a false assumption that assassinating Iran’s top leadership would bring down the government.

dailyNews.title: US judge sides with New York Times against Pentagon journalism policies
dailyNews.description: In his ruling, Judge Paul Friedman ruled the Trump administration sought to force out 'disfavoured journalists'.

dailyNews.title: Pezeshkian says Iran not seeking war with Muslim neighbours
dailyNews.description: Iran’s President Masoud Pezeshkian says his country is not seeking war with its neighbours.

dailyNews.title: Colombia’s President Gustavo Petro under investigation in US for drug ties
dailyNews.description: Faced with reports that two US prosecutors have opened probes, the left-wing leader denies links to drug traffickers.

dailyNews.title: New video shows Justin Timberlake struggling through sobriety tests during Hamptons stop
dailyNews.description: Newly released police body camera footage shows Justin Timberlake struggling through field sobriety tests during his 2024 DWI arrest in Sag Harbor.

dailyNews.title: Kansas man charged in unprovoked park stabbing that left woman critically injured
dailyNews.description: A Kansas man faces attempted murder charges after allegedly stabbing a woman in what police called an unprovoked park attack in Olathe, Kansas.

dailyNews.title: Transgender golfer sues LPGA over policy that protects women's competitions
dailyNews.description: Transgender golfer Hailey Davidson has sued the LPGA, alleging its policy barring biological males who underwent male puberty from women's golf effectively bans all transgender women.

dailyNews.title: Live possum discovered hiding among plush toys in an Australian airport gift shop
dailyNews.description: A wild possum found a clever hiding spot among plush toys in an airport gift shop in Australia and was safely removed, staff confirmed.

dailyNews.title: 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' star Nicholas Brendon dead at 54
dailyNews.description: Nicholas Brendon, who played Xander Harris on "Buffy the Vampire Slayer," died March 20 at age 54. His family says he died in his sleep of natural causes.

dailyNews.title: 'The View' argues whether Iran campaign is historic blunder like Iraq or will keep future Americans safe
dailyNews.description: CNBC's Sara Eisen argued on "The View" that Trump's Iran military operation will keep future Americans safe from a nuclear threat, but co-hosts pushed back.

dailyNews.title: Boxer Tyson Fury's dad, John Fury, reveals their relationship 'is destroyed'
dailyNews.description: John Fury said his relationship with his son, boxer Tyson Fury, was “destroyed," citing decisions on Oleksandr Usyk fights. He also criticized trainer SugarHill Steward.

topStories.description: American Athletic Conference Commissioner Tim Pernetti praised President Donald Trump for signing an executive order to protect the Army-Navy game's exclusive broadcast window.

topStories.title: Rep Boebert rejects call for another $200 billion to fund Iran war, while Americans 'can’t afford to live'
topStories.description: Rep. Boebert warned the policies being enacted by the Trump administration are not putting Americans first, warning the GOP needs to change course before the midterms.

topStories.title: Denmark Was Ready to Blow Up Airfields to Stop a U.S. Invasion of Greenland
topStories.description: The Danes brought blood supplies, explosives and live ammunition to Greenland as part of contingency plans in case President Trump acted on his threats to seize the island.

topStories.title: Trump Friend Asked ICE to Detain the Mother of His Child
topStories.description: Paolo Zampolli, a former modeling agent and a longtime Trump ally, was in a custody battle over his son. An ICE official agreed to help.

dailyNews.description: Paolo Zampolli, a former modeling agent and a longtime Trump ally, was in a custody battle over his son. An ICE official agreed to help.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls NATO allies "cowards" as more Marines head toward Middle East
dailyNews.description: The Iran war reached the three-week mark as about 2,200 more U.S. Marines and three more warships are headed toward the region, two U.S. officials said.

dailyNews.title: Trump is strategizing means to seize Iran's nuclear stockpiles, sources say
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has been strategizing methods and options to secure or extract Iran's nuclear materials, according to multiple sources, as the military campaign against Tehran enters a more uncertain phase.

dailyNews.title: Colombian President Petro caught up in narcotics trafficking probes, sources say
dailyNews.description: The separate narco-trafficking investigations, based out of New York's Southern and Eastern districts, didn't set out to target Petro, but his name has come up during the course of the probes, one source said.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration temporarily lifts sanctions on Iranian oil at sea
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Treasury has authorized the purchase of Iranian oil that's already at sea, exempting buyers from the tight sanctions that have restricted Iran's oil industry for years, as the Trump administration grapples with high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down how U.S. could undermine its own victory against Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump is vowing to continue hitting Iran "very hard," even as he said the country's military is "finished." Mark Montgomery, senior fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies, has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he doesn't want Iran war ceasefire, but is considering 'winding down' military ops
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump also said the Strait of Hormuz, "will have to be guarded and policed, as necessary, by other Nations who use it."

dailyNews.title: Trump: U.S. could end Iran military operations 'right now' but will continue so Iran can 'never rebuild'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's comments followed reports that the Pentagon is sending up to 2,500 more Marines to the Middle East from San Diego.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration unveils national AI policy framework to limit state power
dailyNews.description: AI industry leaders have opposed state-level regulatory efforts, arguing that a "patchwork" of laws would hobble innovation and give China a competitive edge.

dailyNews.title: Elizabeth Warren demands answers on costs, economic impact of 'illegal and reckless war'
dailyNews.description: The liberal Democratic firebrand ripped President Donald Trump, whom she said has 'dragged the United States into an illegal and reckless war.'

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
